summary: Iteration 11 - Employee Management (Gestione Dipendenti) testing completed successfully. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend UI components verified working correctly. The feature allows clients to request employee hires, upload documents for employees, and request terminations. Admins/consultants can view all employees, approve hires (change status to active), confirm terminations, and see notifications. Employee status visual indicators working: green=attivo, amber=in attesa, red=cessato.

issues: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended (inherited from previous iterations)

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/employees/hire-request - Creates employee with pending status
✅ GET /api/employees - Client sees only their employees
✅ GET /api/employees - Admin sees all employees
✅ GET /api/employees/{id} - Employee detail retrieval
✅ PUT /api/employees/{id} - Admin activates employee (pending -> active)
✅ POST /api/employees/{id}/documents - Document upload for employee
✅ POST /api/employees/{id}/terminate - Client requests termination
✅ PUT /api/employees/{id} - Admin confirms termination (terminated status)
✅ GET /api/employee-notifications - List employee notifications
✅ GET /api/employee-notifications/count - Unread notification count
✅ POST /api/employee-notifications/{id}/read - Mark notification read
✅ POST /api/employee-notifications/read-all - Mark all read
✅ Employee status values validation (active, pending, termination_pending, terminated)
✅ Frontend: Admin Dashboard - Dipendenti tab loads with statistics cards
✅ Frontend: Admin - Status filter dropdown (Tutti/Attivi/In attesa/Licenziamento/Cessati)
✅ Frontend: Admin - Notifications bell shows employee notifications
✅ Frontend: Admin - Employee detail modal with 'Attiva Dipendente' and 'Carica Documento' buttons
✅ Frontend: Admin - Employee list with colored status badges
✅ Frontend: Client Dashboard - Dipendenti tab visible
✅ Frontend: Client - 'Richiedi Assunzione' button present
✅ Frontend: Client - Hire form with all required fields (nome, data inizio, mansione, orario, giorni, luogo, tipo contratto, stipendio, note)
✅ Frontend: Client - Employee cards with status badges and action buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Email notifications to 4 predefined recipients (amministrazione@fiscaltaxcanarie.com, segreteria@fiscaltaxcanarie.com, bruno@fiscaltaxcanarie.com, francesco@fiscaltaxcanarie.com) are sent via Brevo API - emails may not arrive in preview environment
Employee documents are stored with base64 encoding in MongoDB - for large files consider cloud storage
Status workflow: pending -> active (admin approves) or pending -> termination_pending (client requests) -> terminated (admin confirms)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration11_employees.py - New test file for employee management
seed_data_creation: Test employees created with TEST_ prefix during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified employee management feature completely. Backend endpoints: POST /api/employees/hire-request, GET /api/employees, POST /api/employees/{id}/documents, POST /api/employees/{id}/terminate, PUT /api/employees/{id}, GET /api/employee-notifications, GET /api/employee-notifications/count. Frontend has Dipendenti tab in both admin (/admin) and client (/dashboard) dashboards. Admin sees statistics (Attivi/In attesa/Da gestire/Cessati) with colored cards, employee list with status badges, notification bell, and employee detail modal. Client sees their employees and can request hires via form. Note: Mario Rossi test employee exists in pending status.

hire_request_api.description: POST /api/employees/hire-request creates employee with all fields (full_name, start_date, job_title, work_hours, work_location, work_days, salary, contract_type, notes)

employee_list_api.description: GET /api/employees returns employees filtered by role (client sees own, admin sees all)

document_upload_api.description: POST /api/employees/{id}/documents uploads document with type and description

termination_request_api.description: POST /api/employees/{id}/terminate requests termination with date and reason

notifications_api.description: GET /api/employee-notifications, GET /count, POST /{id}/read, POST /read-all all working

admin_dashboard_employees_tab.description: Tab shows statistics cards (colored by status), employee list with status badges, filter dropdown, notifications bell

client_dashboard_employees_tab.description: Tab shows employee list with 'Richiedi Assunzione' button, hire form with all required fields

email_notifications.description: Email service (Brevo) configured to send to 4 recipients - may not deliver in preview environment
